item.title: Offices, banks to resume today after Eid holidays
item.description: After a seven-day closure for Eid-ul-Fitr, government offices, banks, and insurance institutions across Bangladesh will reopen tomorrow marking the return to full-scale administrative and economic activities......Bangladesh news updates

item.title: Bangladesh fuel pumps at risk of shutdown, warn owners
item.description: Petrol pump owners in Bangladesh have warned that fuel stations across the country may shut down due to mounting security concerns and an ongoing fuel supply shortage....
